title: No Man's Land
description: An uncompromising Overworld Overhaul, Enhancing world generation in every biome and environment.
body:
![No Man's Land Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527cfcbdc05088cfec1c032302d336faf9106621.png) # What is No Man's Land? **No Man's Land** is a vanilla-friendly overhaul that improves your Overworld, _enhancing environments_ and _adding new ones_ alike - transforming the world with _great care to detail_ in every one of its aspects. Throughout the land, from the tallest peaks to the deepest oceanic trenches, all the way through ancient ruins and dense forests, the world's beauty permeates every block. A mod for those who get immersed in their world to the point of getting lost in it, so infatuated by mystery and discovery. ## What does this mod add? - **All Vanilla Biomes redone**, most enhanced, some reworked. - **New Biomes**, such as the Maple Forest or the Bog. - **New Vegetation** for every climate, such as Reeds in rivers and Flowerbeds in fields. - **New and redone Dungeons**, to challenge explorers and tell a story of who came before. - **Enhanced Ambience**, such as thicker Fog, dependant on the environment. - **Mob Variants**, from Hogs in forests to Highland Cows in mountains, every animal has more personality now. - **Vanilla Mob Remodels**, Pigs, Cows, Squids and more have been brought up to modern artistic standard. - **New Mobs**, such as Billhook Bass in swampy waters, or Deer in forests. - **Tree Tapping**, gather Resin and Maple Syrup by attaching a Tap to a log, and collect it in a cauldron. - **New Food** through the plentiful ingredients added by the mod, with extensive Farmer's Delight integration - **New Blocks**, such as Coarse Bricks and more path types, to new Wood Types such as Willow or Walnut - **New Structures**, including the Deep Well and a variety of Menhirs across the world. - **Miscellaneous Items** to aid in your adventures, such as throwable Firebombs, Explosives, Wooden Scaffolding and more. ## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: Will you port this to other loaders or other versions? Quick answer is No. The minecraft version No Man's Land is on is the one we currently find best for it and it is highly unlikely we will maintain more than one version at a time. In terms of loader, the mod is made for Neoforge. However, if you'd like to play No Man's Land using Fabric, you may use Kilt.
Q: When is the next update? When it's ready :)
Q: Will you add integration with [Insert mod here]? Maybe! It doesn't hurt to ask, but remember: we only add integration with the few other mods we work on, or mods we personally can't play without, such as Farmer's Delight. (By the way, go download it <3)
Q: What is the modpack policy? No Man's Land is ARR, but freely usable as long as it's distributed on its official sites, meaning you can totally add it to your modpack just fine, if it's published on Modrinth or Curseforge. However, if you'd like to modify the mod for any reasons or use any resources from it you'll have to contact us through discord first to get our confirmation.
Q: Can I make an addon for this mod? Yes! You're absolutely welcome to.
## [Contributor Credits](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1fSaHjve32qOUnm4Io2Qk3rz0NcKuhUsCdUWfhJklvC8/edit?usp=sharing) ## [Join our Discord, let us know what you think!](https://discord.gg/JW4utPut9x)
